name: compound-orchestrator
description: Installs and enforces a compound engineering loop across Codex and Claude Code projects.

interface.shortDescription: Enforce plan, review, and compounding loops across coding agents.
interface.longDescription: Compound Orchestrator installs shared Codex and Claude Code project memory, workflow commands, review rubrics, and verification gates so every project task leaves durable knowledge for the next one.
defaultPrompt: Set up compound engineering for this repo.
Check whether this task is ready to finish.
Record the learning from this feature.
